# CleanTreeMac

> Open-source macOS disk space analyzer with sunburst visualization and a deletion basket.

CleanTreeMac scans folders using the system `du` command (with `FastDirectoryScanner` fallback), builds a `FileNode` tree, and displays sizes in a DaisyDisk-style UI. Users pick scan targets on the home screen, navigate folders, queue items in a basket, and delete to Trash.

## Quick facts

- Language: Swift 5, SwiftUI + AppKit (NSOpenPanel)
- Platform: macOS 26.2+ (native)
- Sandbox: disabled (`ENABLE_APP_SANDBOX = NO`)
- Scan engine: `/usr/bin/du -x -k -d 4 <path>` (parallel per selected path)
- Fallback: `FastDirectoryScanner` (`getattrlistbulk`, `ATTR_FILE_ALLOCSIZE`)
- UI locale: Ukrainian
- License: open source

## Architecture map

### Entry & UI layer

- CleanTreeMac/CleanTreeMacApp.swift — @main, WindowGroup, light theme
- CleanTreeMac/ContentView.swift — hosts DiskAnalyzerView
- CleanTreeMac/Views/DiskAnalyzerView.swift — home vs analyzer layout; scan menu; progress panel
- CleanTreeMac/Views/HomeScreenView.swift — volume stats, scan path checkboxes, Сканувати button
- CleanTreeMac/Views/ScanProgressPanel.swift — progress bar, elapsed timer, terminal log, cancel, copy log
- CleanTreeMac/Views/ScanSettingsView.swift — path checkboxes (also in scan menu)
- CleanTreeMac/Views/SunburstChartView.swift — annular segments from DisplayItem[]
- CleanTreeMac/Views/FileListView.swift — scrollable list + footer (free space rows)
- CleanTreeMac/Views/BreadcrumbView.swift — path breadcrumbs
- CleanTreeMac/Views/BasketView.swift — drag-drop delete queue

### State

- CleanTreeMac/ViewModels/DiskAnalyzerViewModel.swift — @Observable @MainActor
  - Owns DiskIndex, navigation history (back/forward), basket, scan log lines
  - scanSettings: ScanSettings.load() — toggling paths does NOT auto-rescan
  - launchInitialScan() → requestDocumentsAccess() → scanSystemDisk()
  - requestDocumentsAccess() — NSOpenPanel for ~/Documents if not readable
  - startScan(at:) — scan Task, heartbeat status, ScanLogger UI forwarding
  - cancelScan() — cancel Task + FolderSizeCalculator.cancelActiveProcesses()
  - displayItems / footerDisplayItems for chart and list
  - navigateInto → DiskIndex lookup; expandFolderIfNeeded → scanFolder

### Models

- CleanTreeMac/Models/FileNode.swift
  - FileNode: id, name, url, size, isDirectory, children, kind (folder | groupedSmall | hiddenSpace | freeSpace | freeAndPurgeable)
  - DisplayItem: wrapper for chart/list coloring
  - BasketItem: queued deletion entry

- CleanTreeMac/Models/ScanSettings.swift
  - paths persisted in UserDefaults key "scanSettings"
  - selectablePaths: home directory, /Applications, /Library (from SystemPaths)
  - orderedPaths: selected paths in display order

### Services (core logic — edit here for scan behavior)

- CleanTreeMac/Services/DirectoryScanner.swift
  - scan(url:) — routes "/" to scanMacintoshHD, else scanFolder
  - scanMacintoshHD — parallel TaskGroup per ScanSettings path; depth=4; merge via MacintoshHDScanAccumulator
  - onPartialUpdate fires after each path completes (not waiting for all)
  - per path: du first → FastDirectoryScanner fallback if du/buildTree fails
  - buildMacintoshHDRoot — priority children, small objects group, hidden space
  - scanFolder — du depth 4 for drill-down; FileManager fallback
  - footerItems — free space rows at Macintosh HD root
  - ScanProgress struct: scannedFolders, currentPath

- CleanTreeMac/Services/FolderSizeCalculator.swift
  - fullSnapshot(path:depth:) — Process: /usr/bin/du -x -k -d N path
  - runDU — streams stdout/stderr via readabilityHandler (prevents pipe deadlock)
  - logs preflight (exists/readable), stderr lines, stdout progress, exit/signal
  - DUProcessRegistry — register/terminateAll for cancel
  - parseTree / buildTree — stdout → FileNode tree, children sorted by size desc
  - du exit 1 with stdout is accepted (common with TCC Permission denied on stderr)

- CleanTreeMac/Services/FastDirectoryScanner.swift
  - getattrlistbulk fallback when du fails
  - parallel sibling scan via DispatchQueue.concurrentPerform
  - always recurses into .app/.framework/.bundle/.plugin

- CleanTreeMac/Services/ScanLogger.swift
  - tags: [scan], [du], [tree], [fast], [bulk], [merge]
  - optional uiForwardFilter + uiForwardHandler → DiskAnalyzerViewModel scan log panel

- CleanTreeMac/Services/DiskIndex.swift
  - pathMap: [String: FileNode] for O(1) navigation
  - install(root:) — full reindex
  - merge(node:) — replace branch, deindex old, index new, refreshAncestors

- CleanTreeMac/Services/FileDeletionService.swift — FileManager.trashItem
- CleanTreeMac/Services/SystemPaths.swift
  - systemRoot, defaultScanPaths (home + /Applications), optionalScanPaths (/Library)
  - excludedFromScan: /System, /private, /dev, /.vol
  - macintoshHDPriorityPaths: /Users, /Applications, /Library
  - displayName, specialURL (/.cleantree/<id>)
  - VolumeStats.forVolume

### Utilities

- CleanTreeMac/Utilities/Formatters.swift — ByteFormat, ScanLogEntry, ScanDurationFormat, ChartPalette
- CleanTreeMac/Utilities/AppTheme.swift — light theme colors

## Data flow

1. User opens app → HomeScreenView (no auto-scan)
2. User selects paths (checkboxes) and taps Сканувати → launchInitialScan()
3. requestDocumentsAccess() if ~/Documents not readable → scanSystemDisk() → startScan("/")
4. DirectoryScanner.scanMacintoshHD() — parallel du per ScanSettings path (depth 4)
5. Each path: FolderSizeCalculator.fullSnapshot → buildTree → merge → onPartialUpdate → UI
6. Final root with hidden space + DiskIndex.install
7. User clicks folder → navigateInto → DiskIndex; empty branch → scanFolder
8. User drops item in basket → deleteBasketContents → FileDeletionService → rescan

## Scan paths (Macintosh HD)

Default selected: user home directory, /Applications
Optional: /Library
Excluded: /System, /private, /dev, /.vol

Defined in SystemPaths.defaultScanPaths, optionalScanPaths, excludedFromScan.

## Info.plist (generated)

INFOPLIST_KEY_NSDocumentsFolderUsageDescription
INFOPLIST_KEY_NSDesktopFolderUsageDescription
INFOPLIST_KEY_NSDownloadsFolderUsageDescription

Text: "CleanTreeMac аналізує вміст диску щоб показати використання простору"

## Conventions for AI edits

- Do not reintroduce App Sandbox without explicit request
- Do not auto-start scan on launch unless user asks
- Checkbox path toggles must NOT trigger rescan (only Сканувати button)
- Prefer one du call per scan path; parallel paths OK via TaskGroup
- Keep streaming stdout/stderr in runDU — do not read pipes only after process exit
- Keep DiskAnalyzerViewModel/UI unchanged unless UI task specified
- FileNode.kind drives navigation: hiddenSpace and freeSpace are not navigable
- Special virtual URLs: /.cleantree/<identifier> via SystemPaths.specialURL
- Ukrainian strings in UI are intentional (target locale)
- Minimize diff scope; no commits unless user requests

## Build

open CleanTreeMac.xcodeproj && xcodebuild -scheme CleanTreeMac -configuration Debug build

## Links

- README: README.md
- Agent guide: AGENTS.md
